raw_12_pre_registration.criterion: |Δadvantage_per_thousand[k] - advantage_per_thousand[k-1]| < 5 across two consecutive ticks → CONVERGED at the smaller N_TRAIN

hypotheses.H1_eternal_restored: advantage_per_thousand > 50 at ALL N_TRAIN ticks (15, 50, 150, 500, 1500) — R-pent chaotic exceeds bigram capacity at 80x80, Law 64 v5 RESTORED structural
hypotheses.H2_still_descending: advantage descends < 50/1000 by N_TRAIN=1500 — Markov universal at any scale, NO restoration
hypotheses.H3_converged_high: CONVERGED at nonzero floor > 50 — Law 64 v5 RESTORED with explicit asymptote
hypotheses.AMBIGUOUS: advantage drops but plateaus above 0 and below 50, OR convergence criterion never met

setup.test_set_window: trailing 15 pairs after step max_train (identical for all ticks; same ladder as T8i + T8j)
setup.execution_environment: Mac local CPU (raw 42) — single-pass, on the order of minutes wallclock, well within Q1 axis-sweep budget

verdict.label: H2_SUPPORTED_MARKOV_UNIVERSAL_NO_RESTORATION
verdict.interpretation: Eternal advantage is NOT restored by APERIODIC R-pentomino chaotic init on 80x80 at high train-volume. Even with 4x grid area vs T8j and a deterministic chaotic seed (no random density confound), Markov order-1 saturates to PARITY (advantage 0/1000) by N_TRAIN=1500. The maximum advantage observed (19/1000 at N_TRAIN=15) is BELOW the H1 threshold (50/1000) at every single tick — H1 falsified outright, H3 falsified by descent past floor. Law 64 v5 restoration HYPOTHESIS REJECTED on aperiodic axis. The 40x40 random-density falsification (T8j) generalizes: order-1 Markov is universal-given-enough-data even on the canonical chaotic Conway seed at 80x80.

law_64_v5_update.reason: Per task spec: Law 64 v5 update gated on H1 or H3 confirmation. H2_SUPPORTED → no v5 update; v4 stands UNCHANGED (eternal advantage falsified universally on tested axes).
law_64_v5_update.v4_status_post_T8k: Law 64 v4 REINFORCED — train-volume saturation now confirmed on three independent axes: (10x10 random / T8i), (40x40 random / T8j), (80x80 R-pent_aperiodic / T8k). The aperiodic init does NOT escape the saturation — order-1 Markov ultimately memorizes the reachable per-cell state distribution regardless of init regime within the 1515-step trajectory window.
remaining_open_questions: Q1 (this test) — ANSWERED: aperiodic init does NOT restore eternal advantage at 80x80
Q2 — Markov order-2/3 baseline: would higher-order surrogate close the gap even faster, or does it actually expose structural advantage at small N_TRAIN?

Q3 (forward) — Does grid size beyond 80x80 (160x160 / 320x320) where R-pent wavefront NEVER reaches boundary within trajectory length finally restore? Capacity scales linearly; trajectory length fixed at 1515; so larger grids = sparser per-cell coverage = potentially more advantage. Open.

raw_91_caveats.C1_execution: Mac local CPU per raw 42 — single-pass, on the order of minutes wallclock, no GPU/witness ledger required for this axis sweep
raw_91_caveats.C2_test_set: Held-out test fixed at trailing 15 pairs of 1515-step trajectory — identical across all 5 N_TRAIN ticks AND directly comparable to T8i (10x10) and T8j (40x40) ladders
raw_91_caveats.C3_orbit_capture: By N_TRAIN=1500, Markov tf_acc reaches 1000/1000 = exact parity with the CA reference. This means the 80x80 R-pent trajectory has entered a regime where the trailing 15 test pairs are PER-CELL PREDICTABLE by the bigram counts learned over the prior 1500 pairs. Either the orbit has stabilized into a low-period attractor by step ~1500, or the per-cell marginals have saturated such that trivial per-cell predictions are correct. Both interpretations falsify H1/H3 structurally.
raw_91_caveats.C4_capacity_scaling: Order-1 per-cell bigram capacity: 4 counts × 6400 cells = 25600 (T8k) vs 6400 (T8j) vs 400 (T8i). 4x capacity over T8j, 64x over T8i. Despite 64x more capacity, the chaotic init still saturates by N=1500. This suggests Markov order-1 universality is robust across init type AND grid size within budget, not a sample-complexity artifact of grid scale alone.
raw_91_caveats.C5_single_seed_single_init_position: Single seed (20260428) with R-pent placed at deterministic center (40,40). H2 confirmation under one configuration is suggestive; multi-init-position sweep (R-pent at corner, off-center, multiple R-pents) is forward step T8l. However, the verdict is SO STRONG (max=19/1000 vs threshold 50/1000) that multi-position would need to find a 2.6x increase in advantage from positional variance alone — implausible on this evidence.

raws_compliance.raw_12_frozen_pre_registration: PASS — H1/H2/H3/AMBIGUOUS declared in tool header before --run; verdict mapping pre-coded
raws_compliance.raw_42_local_execution_caveat: DOCUMENTED — Mac CPU, on the order of minutes wallclock
raws_compliance.raw_91_honesty: PASS — verdict reports H2 honestly, makes explicit that aperiodic-init hypothesis rejected; explicit caveats on single-seed, single init position, orbit capture
